title: Daily Temperatures
problem_statement: Given daily temperatures, return an array where each element is the number of days until a warmer temperature.

examples.explanation: Each day’s answer is the days until a warmer temperature arrives.

intuition: Use a stack to keep indices of unresolved temperatures, updating answers when a warmer day is found.

approaches.name: Monotonic decreasing stack
approaches.description: Keep indices of temperatures in a stack sorted by temperature descending; when a warmer temperature appears, resolve previous days.
approaches.why_not: A brute force nested loop is O(n^2) and too slow for large input.

interview_qa.a: It stores indices of days whose warmer future day has not been found.
Because only cooler or equal temperature days remain unresolved.
